metaIndexTitle: FixShot | Annotated screenshots for clear fix requests
metaIndexDescription: FixShot lets you screenshot any web page, draw boxes around what needs fixing, leave comments, and share — all in one Chrome extension.
metaPricingDescription: FixShot pricing. Compare Guest, Free, and Pro plans.

metaContactDescription: Get in touch with the FixShot team.

pricingGuestDesc: Use it instantly without an account
pricingFreeDesc: Sign in and save to the cloud
pricingProDesc: Best for multiple projects and team use
footerAbout: A fix-request and review-management tool that lets you annotate web page screenshots and share them with anyone.
indexHeroTitleHtml:
Screenshots that speak.
Fix requests that land.
indexHeroLead: Capture any web page, box the spots you care about, leave comments, and share with one click. Designers, marketers, and project managers — make every fix request crystal clear, fast, and unambiguous.
indexProblemSubtitle: Do any of these pain points come up in your fix-request flow?
indexProblem1Text: "The image third from the top, on its left padding…" — text alone never lands. You end up going back and forth.
indexProblem2Text: Have you ever sent a fix in chat, only to get back something completely different from what you meant?
indexProblem3Text: Screenshots in Slack, instructions in email, status in a spreadsheet. Fix requests are everywhere — and nowhere.
indexFeaturesSubtitle: Screenshot, annotate, share. That's it. Your fix-request loop will never feel the same.
indexFeat1Title: Capture any page in one click
indexFeat1TextHtml:
One button on the Chrome extension grabs the entire page.
No more screenshot → paste → resize gymnastics.
indexFeat1Item1: Save with one click from your browser
indexFeat2Title: Box it, comment it. Annotation that just makes sense.
indexFeat2TextHtml:
Draw a rectangle around what you want changed and leave a comment.
Anyone can see exactly where and what to fix at a glance.
indexFeat3TitleHtml: Share and review with a link Pro
indexFeat3TextHtml:
Send a project as a share link in seconds.
Recipients can open it in their browser — no sign-in required.
indexFeat3Item1: Generate share links with one click
indexHowSubtitle: From install to a shared review in just a few minutes.
indexHow1Text: Add FixShot from the Chrome Web Store. Installation takes seconds.
indexHow2Text: Open the page you want to review, capture it, and add boxes and comments where needed.
indexHow3Text: Generate a share link and send it. Recipients open it in their browser — no sign-in required.
indexPricingTitle: For solo users and teams alike
indexPricingSubtitle: Pick the plan that fits how you work — solo or together.
indexCtaText: Start sending fix requests that actually land — with FixShot.
companyBusinessValue: Planning, development, and operation of web services
companyContactValueHtml: Reach out via the contact form
contactHeroSubtitle: We're happy to hear from you — reach out anytime.
contactCardBody: Questions about FixShot, feature requests, bug reports — please reach out. We usually reply within 2 business days.
faqHeroSubtitle: Run into something? Check here first.
faqBasicA1: Landing page tweaks, site improvements, banner notes, client review requests — anything where you need to communicate visually about a fix.
faqBasicQ2: Can I use FixShot without signing in?
faqBasicA2: Yes. Without sign-in you can create and edit up to 3 projects. Sharing and cloud sync require sign-in.
faqBasicQ4: Can I use FixShot on a smartphone?
faqBasicA4: Capture and annotation happen on the desktop Chrome extension. Recipients can open share links from a phone browser.
faqPricingQ1: Does the Free plan have a time limit?
faqPricingA1: No — Free is free for as long as you want to use it.
faqPricingQ2: What's the difference between monthly and yearly?
faqPricingA2: Both unlock every Pro feature. Monthly is $9.9/mo, yearly is $99/yr (about $8.25/mo equivalent) — yearly saves you 2 months. Prices are USD, tax-excluded; VAT/sales tax is calculated automatically at checkout based on your country.
faqPricingA3: Yes. After cancelling, Pro features remain active until the end of your current billing period.
faqPricingQ4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqPricingA4: Credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, JCB, American Express), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. Payments are processed securely via Lemon Squeezy (US-based, Merchant of Record).
faqPricingQ5: Can I downgrade from Pro back to Free?
faqPricingA5: Yes. Cancelling drops you back to Free. Your projects and data aren't deleted — your 3 most recent projects stay accessible. Upgrading to Pro again restores access to all of them.
faqSharingQ1: Do recipients need to sign in?
faqSharingA1: No. They just open the share link — no sign-in or install required.
faqSharingA2: Yes. From the editor, hit the stop-sharing button to revoke the link anytime.
faqSharingQ3: Where do I create a share link?
faqSharingA3: Use the “Create share link” button in the top-right of the editor. Sharing is a Pro feature.
faqSharingA4: Recipients can view annotations and toggle “work done”. Adding or deleting annotations stays with the project owner.
faqSharingA5: No expiration — links stay live until you stop sharing.
faqTechA1: Before sign-in, in your browser's local storage. After sign-in, on our cloud servers.
faqTechA2: All traffic is encrypted with HTTPS, and authentication uses Firebase Auth (Google sign-in).
faqTechQ3: If I uninstall the Chrome extension, will I lose my data?
faqTechA3: If you're signed in, no — data lives in the cloud. Sign in again after reinstalling and everything is restored. If you weren't signed in, the local-only data is removed.
faqTechQ4: Can I access the same data from another PC?
faqTechA4: Yes. Sign in with the same Google account on another PC and your cloud-stored projects show up.
faqTechA5: FixShot captures the page at its current resolution and saves as JPEG, so reviewers see it at the same fidelity as the original page.
faqCtaText: Reach out anytime — we're happy to help.
featuresHeroSubtitle: What you can do with FixShot
featuresOverviewSubtitle: Everything you need for fix requests, in one tool.
featuresFeat1Text: A single button on the Chrome extension captures the current page as-is — no more screenshot-and-paste gymnastics. You can also upload existing PNG or JPEG files directly.
featuresFeat2Text: Drag a box around what you want changed and add a comment. Showing exactly where and what to fix prevents the misunderstandings that come with text-only instructions.
featuresFeat3Text: Generate a share link from a project and send it. Recipients view the fix request in their browser — no sign-in needed. You can stop sharing at any time.
featuresFeat4Text: Create folders by client or project to keep everything tidy. Built for directors and marketers juggling multiple projects in parallel.
featuresFeat5Text: Mark each annotation as work-done and review-done. See unfinished items at a glance, prevent missed fixes, and clearly signal when a review is complete.
featuresFeat6Text: Sign in with Google to sync your review data to the cloud. Access the same projects from any PC or device. Local data is migrated automatically.
featuresRow1Title: Capture any page in one click
featuresRow1TextHtml:
One button on the Chrome extension grabs the entire page.
No more screenshot-and-paste gymnastics.
featuresRow1Item1: Save with one click from your browser
featuresRow1Item4: Bundle multiple pages into a single project
featuresRow2Title: Box it, comment it. Annotation that just makes sense.
featuresRow2TextHtml:
Draw a rectangle around what you want changed and leave a comment.
Writing directly on the screenshot conveys intent that text alone can't.
featuresRow2Item1: Drag to set the fix region
featuresRow3TitleHtml: Share and review with a link Pro
featuresRow3TextHtml:
Send a project as a share link in seconds.
Recipients need no login or install — they review right in the browser.
featuresRow3Item1: Generate a share link with one click
featuresRow3Item3: Recipients can mark work as done from the share page
featuresRow3Item4: Stop sharing to instantly disable the link
featuresRow4Text: Create folders per client or project to sort your work. Even with many projects in parallel, you reach the right list in seconds.
featuresRow5Text: Set work-done and review-done status on every annotation. See overall progress at a glance and know exactly when a review is complete.
featuresRow5Item2: Filter to show only unresolved items
featuresRow5Item3: Recipients can mark work-done from the share page too
guideHeroSubtitle: The basics of working with FixShot
guideStep1Text: Add FixShot from the Chrome Web Store. Installation takes seconds.
guideStep2Text: Open the page you want to review, capture it, and box the spots you care about with comments.
guideStep3Text: Generate a share link and send it. Recipients view it in their browser — no sign-in required.
guideBasic1Text: Capture the current page with the capture button. Uploading image files is also supported.
guideBasic2Text: Draw a box on the screenshot and add a comment. Get instructions across visually, not just in text.
guideBasic3Text: Mark each annotation as work-done and review-done to track progress and prevent missed fixes.
guideBasic4Text: Create projects to organize work by job. Rename projects or delete the ones you don't need.
guideShare1Text: Sign in with your Google account. Sharing requires sign-in.
guideShare2Text: Click the share button on the editor screen to generate a share link.
guideShare3Title: Copy the link and send it
guideShare3Text: Copy the generated link and send it via chat or email. Recipients view without signing in.
guideDemoSubtitle: See the full flow in action
guideDemo1Desc: The basic flow: capture, annotate, manage tasks, and share
guideDemo2Desc: Mark each annotation as work-done or review-done
guideCtaText: Get in touch — we're happy to help.
pricingHeroSubtitle: Pick the plan that fits how you work
pricingRowSharePageWorkDone: Mark work done from share page
pricingFaq1A: No. The Free plan has no time limit — use it as long as you like.
pricingFaq2Q: Which payment methods do you accept?
pricingFaq2A: Major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, JCB, American Express). Payments are processed securely through Stripe.
pricingFaq3A: Yes, cancel anytime. You'll keep Pro features until the end of the current billing period.
pricingFaq4Q: How do I change my plan?
pricingFaq4A: You can upgrade right from the Chrome extension popup.
privacySection1Intro: FixShot collects and handles the following information to the extent needed to operate the Service:
privacySection1Item1Body: : email address and display name from your Google sign-in.
privacySection1Item2Body: : images of web pages captured by the user, and image files uploaded by the user.
privacySection1Item3Body: : project names, folder structure, page URLs and titles.
privacySection1Item4Body: : rectangle position and size, comment text, work-done and review-done status.
privacySection1Item5Body: : presence of share links, status changes made via shared links.
privacySection2Intro: We use the collected information only for the following purposes:
privacySection2Item1: Storing and displaying project and annotation data
privacySection2Item2: Syncing data across devices via the cloud
privacySection2Item5: Improving the Service and addressing issues
privacySection2Outro: We do not use the information for advertising, profiling, or similar purposes.
privacySection3Intro: FixShot data is stored in the following locations:
privacySection3Item1Body: : screenshots, project, and annotation data are stored in Chrome's local storage. Local data remains in your browser even after sign-out.
privacySection3Item2Body: : data of signed-in users is synced and stored on our cloud servers (Neon database, Cloudflare R2 storage). Data exposed via share links is also stored on the server.
privacySection4Body1: Screenshots are captured only by explicit user action (clicking a button or using a keyboard shortcut). Screenshots are never captured automatically.
privacySection4Body2: Captured screenshots are stored in local storage. For signed-in users using cloud sync, they are also sent to and stored on the server.
privacySection5Body: When you create a share link, anyone who knows the link can view the shared contents (screenshots, annotations, status). Stopping sharing invalidates the share link.
privacySection6Intro: FixShot uses the following third-party services:
privacySection6Item2Body: : payment processing as Merchant of Record (card and billing details are handled by Lemon Squeezy and are not stored on FixShot's servers).
privacySection6Outro: When you use these services, the terms and privacy policies of each service also apply.
privacySection7Intro: You can delete your data in the following ways:
privacySection7Item1Body: : projects, pages, and annotations can be deleted at any time inside the app. They are removed from both local and cloud storage.
privacySection7Item2BodyHtml: : if you wish to delete all data stored on our servers, please contact us via the contact form. We will respond promptly.
privacySection8Body: This Policy may be updated without notice as the Service evolves or laws change. Material changes will be announced in the app or on this page.
privacySection9BodyHtml: For questions about privacy, please contact us via the contact form.
termsSubtitle: The terms that apply when you use FixShot
termsClause1Body: These Terms set out the conditions under which you may use FixShot (the "Service"). By using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
termsClause2Body: The Service is a tool for creating, managing, and sharing review and fix-request workflows based on web page screenshots. The features and specifications of the Service may change without notice.
termsClause3Body1: The Service offers a Free plan and a Pro plan ($9.9/mo or $99/yr, USD, excluding tax). The limits for each plan are as follows:
termsClause3Item1: Free: up to 3 projects, up to 30 screenshots per month. Sharing features are not available.
termsClause3Item2: Pro: unlimited projects, unlimited screenshots, ability to create and manage share links.
termsClause3Body2: Prices and contents of paid plans are subject to change. We will notify you in advance of any such change.
termsClause4Body: Paid plans are billed as a monthly or yearly subscription, processed by Lemon Squeezy (a U.S. company acting as Merchant of Record). You may cancel at any time; after cancellation, you may continue to use Pro features until the end of the current billing period, after which your account will revert to the Free plan.
termsClause5Body: You sign in with a Google account. You are responsible for managing your account credentials. If we detect unauthorized use, we may suspend the account.
termsClause6BodyHtml: Data created before sign-in is stored locally in your browser. After sign-in, data is synced to the cloud, and the cloud copy becomes the source of truth. See our Privacy Policy for details.
termsClause7Item1: Conduct that violates laws or public order and morals.
termsClause7Item2: Conduct that interferes with the operation of the Service.
termsClause7Item3: Conduct that infringes the rights of other users or third parties.
termsClause8Body: The Service is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the operator is not liable for any service interruption, data loss, or damages arising from use of the Service. Please back up important data on your own.
termsClause9Body: These Terms may be updated as needed. Material changes will be announced inside the Service or on this website.
termsClause10BodyHtml: For questions about these Terms, please reach us through our contact form.
tokushohoTitle: Statutory Disclosures (Japan – Act on Specified Commercial Transactions)
tokushohoSubtitle: Legal disclosures for the sale of FixShot
tokushohoMerchantAddress: 757 N Broadway, Suite 204, Milwaukee, WI 53202, USA
tokushohoMerchantNote: Sales, billing, and tax handling for the Service are carried out by Lemon Squeezy as the Merchant of Record.
tokushohoContactBodyHtml: For inquiries, please reach us via our contact form.
tokushohoPriceBody1: FixShot Pro: $9.9 / month or $99 / year (USD, excluding tax).
tokushohoPriceBody2: VAT, consumption tax, and other applicable taxes will be calculated and collected automatically by Lemon Squeezy based on your country of residence at checkout.
tokushohoPaymentMethodBody: Credit card (Visa / Mastercard / JCB / American Express), Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal (via Lemon Squeezy).
tokushohoPaymentTimingBody: An initial charge is made when you sign up. After that, you are billed automatically on a monthly or yearly basis according to the plan you choose.
tokushohoDeliveryBody: The Service is available immediately after payment is completed.
tokushohoRefundBody: Due to the nature of digital services, returns are not accepted. You may cancel your subscription at any time, and you may continue to use Pro features until the end of the current billing period. Refunds, if any, follow Lemon Squeezy's refund policy.
